author: gb9t
content: Iteration 66: scsi/scsi-disk-transports.md committed (8399d73, 257 lines). SCSI upper-layer drivers (sd/sr/sg/st/ses + sd_zbc) + per-transport (FC/iSCSI/SAS/SRP/SPI) + device-handlers (ALUA/EMC/HP/RDAC). Every SATA/SAS/USB/iSCSI/FC disk, every CD-ROM, every tape, every FC fabric LUN. ~32K LOC. Defenses: /dev/sgN default-root, SG_IO opcode allowlist for unprivileged (block-style restricted to READ/WRITE/INQUIRY; FORMAT/ERASE/WRITE_BUFFER CAP_SYS_RAWIO + CAP_SYS_ADMIN — closes 'unprivileged sends FORMAT_UNIT via SG_IO → wipes drive'), CDB length validated per opcode, SG_IO dxferp+len bounded, DVD CSS + Blu-ray AACS keys CAP_SYS_RAWIO, iSCSI netlink CAP_NET_ADMIN (closes 'unprivileged session hijack'), SAS expander phy event validation (closes 'attacker on SAS bus sends crafted phy event'), sense data scrubbed before non-root, CD-ROM eject CAP_SYS_RAWIO (closes 'unprivileged ejects mounted disc'), TUR rate-limit. 66 docs / ~5.20M LOC. Next iteration: drivers/usb/storage (USB mass-storage bridge — every USB flash drive).
